stories.headline: OpenAI Model Autonomously Disproves 80-Year Erdős Geometry Conjecture
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI's general-purpose reasoning model autonomously disproved Paul Erdős's 80-year-old unit distance conjecture using a novel cross-domain proof connecting geometry to algebraic number theory, verified by leading external mathematicians.

pull_quote.text: AI is helping us to more fully explore the cathedral of mathematics we have built over the centuries. What other unseen wonders are waiting in the wings?

data_points.label: Year upper bound was last improved

stories.headline: Walmart Credits Sparky AI Agent With Lifting Average Order Value 35 Percent
stories.key_takeaway: Walmart's Sparky AI shopping agent is driving a verified 35 percent higher order value among users, giving the retail sector its clearest benchmark yet for generative AI's direct impact on consumer spending.

pull_quote.text: Agentic commerce is going to be great for our customers. Agentic AI will be great for our associates, because it helps them focus on the things that are most important.

data_points.label: Walmart app users who interacted with Sparky

stories.article_excerpt: Walmart has put a precise number on what its generative AI shopping agent is worth: shoppers who engage with Sparky

stories.headline: Recursive Superintelligence Emerges From Stealth With $650 Million for Self-Improving AI
stories.key_takeaway: Recursive Superintelligence launched from stealth with $650M at a $4.65B valuation to build AI systems that autonomously improve their own architecture and research direction.

pull_quote.text: The fastest path to superintelligence will be realised by AI that recursively improves itself, and does so via open-ended algorithms that drive endless innovation.

stories.article_excerpt: A startup that believes the fastest path to surpassing human intelligence is to let AI improve itself just came out

stories.headline: Anthropic Overtakes OpenAI in Enterprise Adoption According to Ramp Data
stories.key_takeaway: For the first time, Anthropic surpassed OpenAI in paid business adoption according to Ramp's real-transaction AI Index, reaching 34.4% vs. OpenAI's 32.3%.

pull_quote.text: What Anthropic did worked really well — start with a very technical customer base, focus on their needs, really succeed in execution and then start broadening out through tools like Cowork.

stories.article_excerpt: For the first time in the brief but ferociously contested history of commercial AI, Anthropic has more paying business

stories.headline: Dell Launches Deskside Agentic AI Workstations Cutting Cloud Token Costs 87 Percent
stories.key_takeaway: Dell's new Deskside Agentic AI workstations promise enterprises up to 87% savings over cloud API costs within two years and a three-month break-even on hardware.

pull_quote.text: Many have learned this one the hard way, whether it's hitting token limits or the surprise cloud bills.
pull_quote.role: SVP, Client Solutions Group, Dell Technologies

stories.article_excerpt: The sticker shock is real. A single Dell engineer ran up a $3,400 cloud bill in 24 hours — one billion tokens, one developer

stories.headline: Anthropic Co-Founder Jack Clark Predicts AI Will Win Nobel Prize Within 12 Months
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark publicly committed to a 12-month timeline for an AI-assisted Nobel Prize-worthy discovery at Oxford, pairing capability optimism with a continued existential risk warning.

pull_quote.text: If we stand by and let synthetic intelligence multiply, then we'll eventually be forced into reactivity.
pull_quote.role: Co-founder and Head of Policy, Anthropic

stories.article_excerpt: Standing at Oxford's Institute for Ethics in AI, the man who helped build one of the world's most powerful AI labs told the audience

stories.headline: HCLTech Report Warns 43 Percent of Enterprise AI Initiatives May Fail
stories.key_takeaway: HCLTech's survey of 467 senior executives finds that 43 percent of major enterprise AI initiatives are projected to fail due to execution gaps, not technology limitations.

pull_quote.text: The pressure to move fast is real, but without the right investment in people, in helping them understand, trust and work effectively alongside AI, speed can just as easily amplify failure as success.
pull_quote.role: CTO and Head of Ecosystems, HCLTech

stories.headline: Wirestock Raises $23 Million Series A to Scale Multimodal AI Data Platform
stories.key_takeaway: Wirestock's pivot from stock photography to multimodal AI training data has produced $40M in annualized revenue and 20x creator payout growth.

pull_quote.text: The cornerstone of our thesis was that multimodal data will be increasingly important, not just to create images or videos, but for models to complete real-world tasks.

stories.article_excerpt: A stock photography platform's pivot to AI training data supply has produced one of the sector's more striking business transf

stories.headline: Digital Health Startups Raise $4 Billion in Q1 2026 Setting Post-Pandemic Record
stories.key_takeaway: Just 12 companies captured 59% of all Q1 2026 digital health venture capital as AI became a baseline expectation, pushing average deal size to a five-year high of $36.7 million.

pull_quote.text: When everyone has AI, the technology stops being the differentiator.
pull_quote.role: Venture fund and digital health research firm

stories.article_excerpt: Digital health startups raised $4 billion in venture capital during Q1 2026 — a billion more than a year ago and the str

stories.headline: GitHub Confirms 3800 Internal Repositories Breached Via Poisoned VS Code Extension
stories.key_takeaway: A poisoned Nx Console VS Code extension live for just 18 minutes allowed TeamPCP to steal credentials and exfiltrate 3,800 internal GitHub repositories.

pull_quote.text: A single VS Code extension on one employee's machine was enough to get access to 3,800 internal GitHub repositories. Most security teams still have zero visibility into what extensions or packages are on their developers' machines.

stories.article_excerpt: A single malicious update — live for just 18 minutes — was enough for TeamPCP to walk through the front door of one of the internet

stories.headline: Maryland Becomes First State to Prohibit AI-Driven Surveillance Pricing
stories.key_takeaway: Maryland's Protection From Predatory Pricing Act makes the state the first to ban AI-driven personalized pricing in grocery stores and delivery platforms, effective October 1, 2026.

pull_quote.text: Surveillance pricing allows companies to take advantage of that information asymmetry and charge you as much as they think you're individually willing to pay.

data_points.label: Est. family overcharge from algorithmic pricing
Max price discrepancy found between shoppers

stories.headline: Colorado Comprehensive AI Accountability Law Takes Effect June 30
stories.key_takeaway: Colorado's landmark AI accountability law was repealed and replaced just 38 days before its June 30 effective date, swapping a duty-of-care regime for a narrower transparency framework.

pull_quote.text: SB 189 removes many of the hallmarks of the Colorado AI Act — such as a duty of care, risk management programs, and impact assessments — in favor of a disclosure-based framework with limited rights in narrow circumstances.

stories.article_excerpt: Thirty-eight days before Colorado's sweeping artificial intelligence accountability law was scheduled to take effect, Governor

stories.headline: AI Trading Lab Nof1 Raises $15 Million to Train Frontier Financial Market Models
stories.key_takeaway: Nof1's $15M round bets that frontier AI models require purpose-built financial training — proven by eight models finishing in profit just six times across 32 live experiments.

pull_quote.text: Nof1 aims to build the scaffolding and intelligence to power AI-driven trading today, while Recursive Superintelligence is working toward foundational capabilities that will define what AI can do tomorrow.

stories.article_excerpt: A live experiment that put OpenAI, Google, Anthropic, and xAI models to work with real money has produced a sobering data set — and a $15 million

stories.headline: NVIDIA Survey Finds AI Delivering Clear ROI Across Healthcare From Radiology to Drug Discovery
stories.key_takeaway: NVIDIA's survey of 600+ healthcare professionals finds 70% actively deploying AI, with 85% of executives reporting revenue gains and clear ROI in radiology and drug discovery.

pull_quote.text: The organizations seeing impact are those that embed AI into existing workflows instead of layering AI on top as a separate tool.
pull_quote.role: Clinical AI Strategy Lead, Visiba U.K.
